steps.name: project-setup
steps.summary: uv 0.11.15 설치, uv sync 완료, services/+tests/ 패키지 트리 생성, ruff All-passed, pytest collect-only exit=5(no tests)

steps.name: config
steps.summary: config.py + Config frozen dataclass + load_config(); 5 tests (성공/단일누락/전체누락/빈문자열/frozen) 통과

steps.name: naver-list
steps.summary: fetch.py: PostRef + is_naver_blog_main(blog_id+categoryNo 튜플, m.blog 도메인 허용)/list_posts(category_no 인자)/filter_today + JS-style escape 치환. 누적 26 tests 통과

steps.name: naver-body
steps.summary: fetch.py 확장: ArticleText + fetch_naver_post(BS4 se-main-container) + fetch_generic(trafilatura) + fetch_article 라우터. 7 추가 tests 통과 (누적 24)

steps.name: summarize
steps.summary: summarize.py: Anthropic Haiku 4.5 + prompt caching + JSON 스키마 검증. 8 tests 통과 (정상/모델/캐싱/user content/4가지 스키마 위반)

steps.name: telegram-send
steps.summary: telegram.py: format_message + send (httpx.Client) + 4096자 절단. 6 tests 통과 (포맷 3 + send 3)

steps.name: cli-orchestration
steps.summary: __main__.py: argparse + URL 분기 + N개 글 순회 + 부분실패 정책 (rc 0/1/2). 8 tests + 전체 51 tests 통과, --help 출력 정상
